rationale: Educ. Code §25.037 governs state fund apportionment transfers when students change districts. It has no operative connection to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: For purposes of computing state allotments to school districts under the Foundation School Program, the attendance of the child before the date of transfer is counted by the transfer sending district and the attendance of the child after the date of transfer is counted by the transfer receiving district.
_note: No conflict identified; §25.037 addresses student transfer mechanics, not homestead exemption levels.
